_comment: Species: Heaven-Defying Beast (逆天兽) from I Shall Seal the Heavens. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Heaven-Defying Beast

canonical.appearance: Formless beast of defied-heaven law, manifests as a chimeric horror 10 m tall
canonical.size: 10 m adult, 20000 jin; true form spans skies
canonical.behavior: Born of accumulated defied-heaven qi; hunts those who defy heaven; cultivates by absorbing heavenly backlash
canonical.habitat: Heaven-defying forbidden zones, tribulation aftermath sites
canonical.diet: heavenly backlash, defied-heaven qi, tribulation remnants
canonical.relationships: Enemy of all cultivators who defy heaven
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: heaven_defying_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
